_note: Reuse shared company wikis across projects. Build the devops/integrations wikis ONCE in their own git repos (commit the compiled knowledge/wiki/), then drop this registry into any project and `wikikit.py sync --all`. `contains: "wiki"` = already compiled, reference only (no recompile); use `contains: "sources"` instead if the repo holds raw docs you want compiled per project. Cross-link shared concepts as [[devops:Release Pipeline]] / [[integrations:SSO]]; `wikikit.py lint --all` checks they resolve.
